name: Wild About Chocolate Chips
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Miniature red candy-coated chocolate pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Place sheets of foil on countertop for cooling cookies.
2. In a large bowl, combine brown sugar and shortening. Beat until well blended. Add milk and vanilla; beat again until smooth. Stir in egg.
3. In another bowl, mix flour, salt, and baking soda. Gradually add this mixture to the chocolate mixture, stirring just until combined. Fold in chocolate chips.
4. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough 2 inches apart on ungreased baking sheets. Press red candy-coated pieces into the tops of the cookies.
5. Bake one sheet at a time for 5-7 minutes, or until lightly golden. Do not overbake. Let cool on sheets for 2 minutes before transferring to foil to cool completely. Makes about 5 dozen cookies.
